creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
Howdy,
I once worked on that port...I want to note a symbolic link works fine
(so that the executable will be in the path), and that it would be a
good idea if someone in Walnut Creek signed the .ps license and sent it
to France.

I hope this port makes it to the 2.2-Release,

Pedro.
